title: NuclearMon: Ashlands
subtitle: Post-Nuclear Pokémon War

platform_specs.engine: libdragon / OoT Decomp / ModLoader64 / Ship of Harkinian

story_hook: Thirty years ago, the Great War scorched Kanto. The missiles fell on Cinnabar, on Saffron, on the Pokémon League itself. When the skies burned green, the Pokémon didn't die. They changed. Mutated. Became something new and terrible. Now, Poké Balls are currency. Pure-strain Pokémon are myths. And in the crater where Viridian City once stood, something vast stirs beneath the ash.
core_loop:
1. Explore the wasteland (third-person, n64 controls)
2. Engage mutated Pokémon in real-time combat (Z-target + C-button moves)
3. Weaken and capture using scarce Poké Balls
4. Manage radiation exposure and Pokémon mutation levels
5. Scavenge, craft, and trade with factions
6. Uncover the truth behind The Flash

chapters.title: The Cradle
chapters.summary: You wake in Pallet Ruins. Professor Oak's AI hologram gives you your first pure-strain starter and warns you about the crater.

chapters.title: Into the Ash
chapters.summary: Your first journey into high-rad territory. The Geiger Counter becomes essential. You discover the Rad Cult performing rituals.

chapters.title: The Silph Gate
chapters.summary: The Silph Remnant controls Poké Ball manufacturing. Help them, and gain access to Military Balls. Cross them, and face their mechs.

chapters.title: Canal of Ghosts
chapters.summary: The flooded city hides pre-war tech. The water-types here are bioluminescent horrors. Oak Enclave needs samples.

chapters.title: Mine of Whispers
chapters.summary: Uranium veins run through the old caves. The deeper you go, the more mutated the Pokémon. A Vault Dweller settlement needs rescue.

chapters.title: Meltdown
chapters.mechanic: Final boss: mutation purging & legendary capture
chapters.summary: The reactor core still burns. Nuclear Charizard nests here, absorbing radiation for decades. This is the end—or the beginning.

mod_ideas.name: Hardcore Mode
mod_ideas.description: Permadeath. No RadAway. Poké Balls break after 3 uses.

mod_ideas.name: New Game+
mod_ideas.description: Carry over mutation research. Enemies scale. New legendary spawns.

mod_ideas.name: Co-op Companion
mod_ideas.description: Second player controls your lead Pokémon in split-screen.

mod_ideas.name: The Vaults
mod_ideas.description: 10 underground dungeon maps with pre-war loot and pure-strain Pokémon.

mod_ideas.name: Nuka-Cherry Overhaul
mod_ideas.description: Add addiction system. Too much healing causes hallucination battles.

mod_ideas.name: Rocket Reborn Uprising
mod_ideas.description: New faction war questline. Capture or destroy Rocket bases.

mod_ideas.name: Ghastly Nights
mod_ideas.description: Night-only survival mode. Ghost/Radiation types swarm. Build defenses.
